meaning: [军] Product Improve,产品改进n. 派(π),圆周率(π)
examples: The key is the stylesheet processing instruction (PI) in the second line.
Zu was best known for his calculation of pi (π).
In order to remember Zu, some mathematicians suggest calling pi "Zu Lv".
Life of Pi also picked up Oscars for cinematography, original score and visual effects.
Kerry's many audio books include Life of Pi (Reader of the Year, APA Awards).
